assertions.title: No duplicate SVG icon markup across component files

steps.action: Grep for grid icon pattern 'rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"' across src/
steps.observed: Found in both App.js (line 320) and Icons.jsx (line 13)

steps.action: Grep for video icon pattern 'polygon points="10 8 16 12 10 16"' across src/
steps.observed: Found in both Icons.jsx (line 32) and ModuleList.js (line 178)

steps.action: Grep for atom/lab icon pattern 'ellipse cx="12" cy="12" rx="10" ry="4"' across src/
steps.observed: Found in both Icons.jsx (lines 48-50) and ModuleList.js (lines 198-200)

steps.action: Grep for flashcards icon pattern 'rect x="2" y="4" width="12" height="16" rx="2" transform="rotate(-15 8 12)"' across src/
steps.observed: Found only in Icons.jsx (line 65) — no duplicate

steps.action: Grep for <svg in DashboardSections.js and GoalCard.js
steps.observed: No inline SVGs found in either file — shared icon imports working correctly

steps.expected: No inline SVGs (should use shared imports)

flashcardsIcon.pattern: rect x="2" y="4" width="12" height="16" rx="2" transform="rotate(-15 8 12)"

filesWithInlineSvg.src/App.js: Has inline SVGs for hamburger menu icons (grid, list, settings gear) — these are different from the 4 stat card icons
filesWithInlineSvg.src/components/ModuleList.js: Has 4 inline <svg> elements at lines 117, 170, 190, 216 — includes video and atom icon duplicates
filesWithInlineSvg.src/components/dashboard/DashboardSectio: No inline SVGs — correctly uses shared imports
filesWithInlineSvg.src/components/GoalCard.js: No inline SVGs — correctly uses shared imports

assertions.issues: Duplicate SVG icon markup found in 3 of 4 patterns. Grid icon duplicated in App.js (line 320, hamburger menu). Video and atom icons duplicated in ModuleList.js (lines 178, 198-200). The App.js duplicates are in the mobile hamburger menu (different context from stat cards), but the ModuleList.js duplicates appear to be the same stat card icons that should have been replaced by shared imports.

summary: Tested 5 cross-area assertions: 4 passed (tests, lint, format, build), 1 failed (VAL-CROSS-005: duplicate SVG icon markup found). Grid icon pattern duplicated in App.js and Icons.jsx; video and atom icon patterns duplicated in ModuleList.js and Icons.jsx. DashboardSections.js and GoalCard.js correctly use shared icon imports with no inline SVGs.
